zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Neville於大約1465年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Sir John Neville36歲，母親Isabel Ingoldesthorpe26歲。她於大約1481年與William Hudleston Esq.結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1516年10月12日在英國斯塔福爾艾爾福德享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Neville于大约1465年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲Sir John Neville36岁，母亲Isabel Ingoldesthorpe26岁。她于大约1481年与William Hudleston Esq.结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1516年10月12日在英国斯塔福爾艾爾福德享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobel
meanings: Variant spelling of   Isabel .

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Neville was born about 1465, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Sir John Neville, was 36 and her mother, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, was 26. She married William Hudleston Esq. about 1481. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 12 October 1516, in Elford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Neville est née environ 1465, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Neville, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Hudleston Esq. environ 1481. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1516, à Elford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Neville um 1465 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Neville 36 und ihre Mutter Isabel Ingoldesthorpe 26. Sie hat um 1481 William Hudleston Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1516 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Elford, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Neville è nata il circa 1465 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Neville, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Hudleston Esq. circa 1481. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 ottobre 1516, nel Elford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Nevilleが約1465年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Nevilleは36歳，母Isabel Ingoldesthorpeは26歳であった。約1481年にWilliam Hudleston Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1516年10月12日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエルフォードで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Neville(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Neville(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Ingoldesthorpe(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1481년 William Hudleston Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 10월 12일 영국 스태퍼드실르 엘퍼드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Neville, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hudleston Esq. aproximadamente 1481. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1516, em Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Neville родилась около 1465 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Neville было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hudleston Esq. около 1481 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 12 октября 1516 г. в местности элфорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Neville nació aproximadamente 1465, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Neville, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabel Ingoldesthorpe, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Hudleston Esq. aproximadamente 1481. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1516, en Elford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
